code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut product = 1
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut started = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i == n
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if started
      product = product * sign * cur
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      started = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not started
    sign = -1
    started = true
  else if b == 43 and not started
    sign = 1
    started = true
  else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    started = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
